query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A handwritten postcard covered in dense cursive script lies atop scattered papers and envelopes. The postcard features a blank rectangular box in its upper left corner. Beneath and around it, printed documents, forms, and yellow-highlighted strips are visible, with fragments of typed text and a pink-edged paper in the lower right.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A handwritten postcard covered in dense cursive script lies in sharp focus atop scattered papers and envelopes, while the surrounding documents deliberately soften into blur through shallow depth of field. The postcard features a blank rectangular box in its upper left corner, and beneath it printed forms, yellow-highlighted strips, and a pink-edged paper dissolve into the out-of-focus background.
